name: loven7-mail-cloudflare-suite
description: Enhanced admin and webmail frontends for Cloudflare Temp Mail / cloudflare_temp_email.

scripts.check:webmail: npm --prefix apps/webmail run check:functions:headers && npm --prefix apps/webmail run check:functions:cors && npm --prefix apps/webmail run check:functions:image
scripts.check:release: npm run check:cloudflare && npm run lint:admin && npm run check:webmail && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:admin && npm run build:webmail
